title: xanthoxalis laxa
intro: Xanthoxalis laxa, also known as wood sorrel, is a perennial plant that belongs to the oxalis family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of wood sorrel include reducing inflammation, treating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Wood sorrel can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and it is often used in traditional herbal remedies.
